CustomField.formula: IF( mql_status__c= 'Hard MQL', IMAGE("https://similarweb--c.vf.force.com/resource/1728982545000/MQL_color_hard?", "green", 16, 50 )&"Hard MQL", IF( mql_status__c= "Soft MQL", IMAGE("https://similarweb--c.vf.force.com/resource/1728982643000/MQL_color_soft?", "turquoise", 16, 50 )&"Soft MQL", IF( mql_status__c= "Nurture", IMAGE("https://similarweb--c.vf.force.com/resource/1728982736000/MQL_color_nurture?", "grey", 16, 50 )&"Nurture", IF( mql_status__c= "Reserve", IMAGE("https://similarweb--c.vf.force.com/resource/1728982670000/MQL_color_reserve?", "yellow", 16, 50 )&"Reserve", IF( mql_status__c= "Unverified MQL", IMAGE("https://similarweb--c.vf.force.com/resource/1728982717000/MQL_color_unverified?", "Lila" , 16, 50)&"Unverified MQL", "")))))
CustomField.label: MQL_status_color
